name: typescript-native-bridge
description: typescript-shaped drop-in backed by the typescript-go in-process NAPI bridge. Alias as `"typescript": "npm:typescript-native-bridge"` to switch a consumer (tsslint, vue-tsc, ...) onto tsgo with no code changes.

scripts.build:bridge: node tools/patch-tsgo.js && cd typescript-go/poc-napi && go build -buildmode=c-shared -o bridge.dylib bridge.go
